title: Shaderpacks
description: This "modpack" is an set of shaders for minecraft Fabric.
body:
# What is Shaderpacks and why?
## Section.1 | Shaders
Shadepacks offers shaders like ex:(BSL and Lux) as a set of Shaders you can use.
## Section.2 | Is Server supported?
It is largely Optional as it runs on the client. Not recomanded for server use
### Section.3 | Is the modpack compatible?
Yes along if it is on Fabric and it has mods that does support shaders
(ex: Create does not support Shaders it is not recomanded to mix in with this modpack)
